https://producerwav.com/product/loushi-ethereal-echoes-sound-kit/


Introducing the “Ethereal Echoes Sound Kit” – a game-changer for music creators. With 60+ one shots, 40+ accents, 20+ MIDI files, and 20+ phrases, this kit is your ticket to crafting celestial soundscapes.

Elevate your productions with carefully curated elements, from ethereal one shots to dynamic accents, opening doors to endless creative possibilities. Unleash your sonic potential and transform your music into an ethereal masterpiece with the “Ethereal Sound Kit.”

Includes:

60+ ONE SHOTS: Bass, Bells, Keys, Pads, Synths
40+ ACCENTS: Perfect for adding that extra spark to your tracks.
20+ MIDIS: Drag and drop for instant inspiration.
20+ PHRASES: Perfect starting point for your next tracks
ROYALTY FREE: No worries about licensing – use them freely in your music.
LABELED BY KEY: Easily match accents to your compositions.

title: e-mu sample sets
description: Nearly all if not all of the sample sets of E-Mu's modules once made available for use with their Proteus X and Emulator X progams. The programs are available elsewhere in Archive, as are sample sets E-Mu ported from older Emulators, and several Ensoniq synthesizers. All are in E-Mu Emulator format. Abandonware.

title: formysake (kit in the style of lucybedroque,prettifun,egobreak)
Yaseer - VESPERA Vol. 2 (Analog Lab Bank)
description:
VESPERA: Analog Lab Vol.II brings 50 new handcrafted presets designed to capture the emotion, texture, and atmosphere of late-night sessions. Inspired by the golden tones of analog synths and the depth of modern R&B, this collection blends shimmering keys, warm pads, nostalgic leads, and textured basses — all sculpted to glide effortlessly into your production.

DISCLAIMER: Make sure to have the newest version of Analog Lab V installed, with all new Libraries (Aug.Piano, Aug.Brass..) otherwise some presets won't work properly.

title: Zero-G - Koncept & Funktion
description:
Publication date
    2004-04 
Topics
    Zero-G, sample pack, sample cd, sample, samples
Item Size
    2.4G 

Koncept & Funktion is an underground Drum & Bass sample library produced by David & Nic Higham in the UK, that turns your computer into a super-powerful DnB production machine, with all the sounds you need to turn out unique professional quality dance tracks.

You'll feel like you've died and gone to heaven when you get your hands on this creative and highly useable Drum & Bass production library, which provides everything you'll need.

Find yourself creating superb unique tracks in no time at all and you'll be hard pressed to tear yourself away from your sampler!

Even if you're not interested in Drum & Bass, there's enough variety and flexibility to make this massive (over 1 GB) sample collection worth investigating for all kinds of music.

DnB producers will find plenty to keep them happy and they're likely to find themselves conjuring up a masterpiece before they know it.

title: Bizarre Guitar (KONTAKT) by Spectrasonics
description:
Topics
    Spectrasonics, Bizarre Guitar, 90s, Samples, KONTAKT, Audio
Item Size
    360.9M 

No introduction is needed for such a marvelous sample library such as this; never lost in the hearts of Silent Hill fans. I had meant to upload this muuuuch earlier than now but had been sidetracked by a bunch of life stuff. Anyways, please enjoy! NICNT file included as well as a custom made wallpaper for the library~!

UPDATE! : I've finally made a slimmed-down version of this KONTAKT library specifically as a companion for Omnisphere, only containing the patches and samples that didn't make the Omni-cut, so to speak.

title: Wizoo Platinum 24 Acoustic Drums For Akai S 1000
description:
This is a collection of one shot samples of an acoustic drum kit, multisampled at different velocity levels, assembled into kits. The original ISOs are a weird type of cd-rom that can't simply be read on a normal computer without the help of specialist sampler software like NI Kontakt or similar or the Akai hardware these were made for.

A rip made in 2007 that is presumed mostly complete is provided in the zip files, giving direct access to WAV versions of the samples.

title: The44thfloor - MPC Floppy Disk VOL.3 (Drum Kit)
description:
The44thfloor Presents - MPC Floppy Disk VOL.3 (Drum Kit)

The hardest drum kit of the Summer! Over 200 drum sounds, breaks & drag & drop drum midi files.

Recorded & Processed using the classic MPC 2000xl & the original MPC 60 to get that raw & gritty sound!

title: Northstar Drumscapes Roland (Roland) ISO
description:
Northstar - Drumscapes Roland

Northstar Productions Drumscapes Vol 1 specs:

Year of release: 1992

Format:             Roland



Sample CD-ROM library in Roland S-770 and compatible format





Drumscapes Volume 1 is a collection of drum samples, including single hits and full grooves,
formatted on CD-ROM for the Roland S-770 and compatible samplers and sample players.

From the CD-ROM’s booklet:  “Drumscapes are direct to digital, live recordings of fully produced studio drum tracks.  
In addition, each song track includes every individual drum and cymbal hit for digital sampling.”

The recording quality is extremely good: the sounds are very punchy, full-bodied,
and the drum patterns are tight and perfectly looped.  
The single hits also are recorded very well, so it’s easy to create your own drum kits,
picking and choosing from the different volumes.

The vibe here is for the most part on the acoustic side of rock/pop,
with the occasional venture into hip-hop or Motown –  These samples are really good
and if you play any of the styles listed here  below, you will not be disappointed.

The styles included are: Rhythm & Blues Hip Hop/Rap Adult Contemporary/Light Jazz Ballad
Medium Rock Fast Heavy Rock Power Ballad Fast Shuffle Slow Shuffle Pop/Country Ballad
Fast Techno Rock Medium Techno Rock Uptempo Funk Slow Motown and as a bonus there’s also a full
set of percussion samples. In order to use these CD-ROM you will need a SCSI CD-ROM drive connected
to your S-series sampler or XV-5080. Keep in mind that certain sound data will need 32MB of memory,
supported only by the S-760. The S-770 and 750 have less.

Northstar Productions Drumscapes Vol 1 audio demos

title: Zero-G - Pure Trip Hop WAV
description:
It's difficult to define trip-hop, and most trip-hop artists deny they are part of any scene at all. Often described as "instrumental hip hop", emphasis is on the music itself but every DJ producer has their own way of keeping a track alive so there can never be a distinctive trip-hop sound.. It takes ideas from jazz, blues, hip-hop, dub, ambient, even classical music. 

PURE TRIP HOP draws its inspiration from artists like DJ Shadow, DJ Krush, Wagon Christ, Depth Charge, Attica Blues, U.N.K.L.E., and even The Chemical Brothers. It's a wide ranging set of ingredients for constructing accomplished trip hop, including 30 musical pieces divided into their separate elements plus extra helpings of beat loop samples, bass lines, EP chords and drum hits. Keys and BPMs are indicated.

Download includes ACIDized WAV and REX formats only.

title: Retro Sample CDS
description:
Here I will upload some of the old 90s early 00s sampling CDs in their respective format, or converted to any open domain sampler format (sf2, sfz - but mostly sfz) which can be played in various samplers or using Sforzando VST.  

I've made this decision because sometimes using an instance of e.g. Kontakt VST may be a little bit naive for just one 200kB patch. But that depends, so here you can mostly download original ISO or MDX images and then You can decide to what format you'll convert them.

One of the benefits of SFZ format is such that you can use either samples on their own or use given .sfz file in your sampler to unleash the true layering / grouping of each program patch.

title: Gort's Soundfonts by Bree Gorton
description:
A set of experimental, fun, Moog-like Soundfonts developed by Bree Gorton.

Gort's Synth v1 and the Complete Works collection (all v2 sounds) are designed to work on a Sound Blaster Live. The v3 sounds include some fixes that make them functional on other sound devices, however on those other sound devices the resonant filters all get botched - so you'd need yourself an SB Live in order to hear the sounds as they were intended to be heard.

Includes the following Soundfonts:

    Gort's Synth (v1, v2, v3)
    Gort's Extras (v2, v3)
    Gort's MiniPiano (v2 + readme, v3)
    Gort's Filters (v2, v3)
    Gort's Midget (v2,v3)
    Gort's DoubleDecker (v2 + readme, v3)


Abridged readme (v2, full is in the archive):

title: Zero-G - Koncept & Funktion (2004)
description:
Koncept & Funktion is an underground Drum & Bass sample library produced by David & Nic Higham in the UK, that turns your computer into a super-powerful DnB production machine, with all the sounds you need to turn out unique professional quality dance tracks.

You'll feel like you've died and gone to heaven when you get your hands on this creative and highly useable Drum & Bass production library, which provides everything you'll need.

Find yourself creating superb unique tracks in no time at all and you'll be hard pressed to tear yourself away from your sampler!

Even if you're not interested in Drum & Bass, there's enough variety and flexibility to make this massive (over 1 GB) sample collection worth investigating for all kinds of music.

DnB producers will find plenty to keep them happy and they're likely to find themselves conjuring up a masterpiece before they know it.

https://archive.org/details/zero-g-koncept-funkiton/Zero-G+-+Koncept+%26+Funktion/Beatmachine/Drum+Loops/Beats+100-BPM/Open+Sound+System.wav

title: Ueberschall - Guitar Feedback - Amps on 11
description:
https://archive.org/details/ueberschall-guitar-feedback/Ueberschall+-+Guitar+Feedback/01+Amp+FDBK+120/08fdb120_GF_amp+fdbk_e.wav

Guitar Feedback brings art from the noise. With the right guitar, the right amp and at the right volume (loud), the right guitar player can conjure something magical from what can be uncontrollable noise. Guitar Feedback does just that and explores the huge range of sonic possibilities the interaction between an electric guitar and a loud amp can bring.

title: Ueberschall - Trance ID 2
description:
Following the runaway success of Trance ID, Ueberschall strikes back with the second installment of the highly acclaimed sample library. Trance ID2 incorporates the latest trends in the genre such as Neo-, Electro-, and Tech-Trance, as well as elements from Progressive and Minimal.

The crush all construction kits on Trance ID 2—powered by the Elastik Loop Player—offer a huge amount of cutting-edge drum loops, synth patterns, bass lines, chord progressions, atmospheres, air and rumble, percussion and fx-sounds which can be seamlessly combined with each other, giving you thousands of possibilities and enabling you to arrange killer tracks within minutes.

Compliance
Trance ID 2 kits are structured into 4 folders—one containing the main mix, a variation mix with alternative sequences and phrases, as well as a mix with separate intro and and outro’s. On top of that you get a folder containing all the individual drum sounds.
BPM information and root key (key signatures) are embedded in all loop file names, simplifying selection and direct use.

The Producer's Sound Effects Library, "The Library of the Industry", is a CD Sound Effects Library consisting of 13 CDs, released in 1990 by PSEL (and S.O.S.), and created and produced by Joel Valentine and PSEL (Producer's Sound Effects Library).

It may be the source of some of Joel's sound effects used by Hacienda Post & Advantage Audio.

title: Pocket Fuel - Rhythmic Architectural Design Systems (RADS) Vol. 3 - Multi-Track HiHats and Rides
description:
Publication date
    1999 
Topics
    sample cd, sample pack, drum, drum pack, pocket fuel
Item Size
    790.3M 

RADS Volume 3 Multi-Track HiHats And Rides contains four independent
instrument tracks (sound files): two overhead tracks and a stereo pair
of room tracks. Four different ride cymbals and two different hihats
were used during the recording session to offer a large selection of
sounds. The ride cymbals remain constant at two measures a loop, while
the hihat performances vary in length. Each hihat loop starts at a soft
dynamic and continues for several measures to its loudest. This works
exceptionally well for choosing a desired performance dynamics without
having to audition dozens of different loops.

title: Beckstrom - Korg Volca Modular drum kit samples
description:
# About

A collection of drum/percussion sounds created on the Korg Volca Modular synthesizer

It's a really fantastic synthesizer and I've barely scratched the surface! Before I bought one, I watched many demonstration/patching videos about it, and none of them tried synthesizing percussion. It definitely lends itself well to grungy atonal sequences, but it can also be coaxed into making percussion.

The main challenge in using it to create percussion sounds is the lack of a noise generator. I used a number of different approaches to get "noise," including feeding oscillators back into themselves and running the "woggle" module at audio rates. Other types of sounds like cowbell are much easier, for those I often just used some fine-tuning of the dual oscillator module. Because of its patchability and i/o, it would certainly be possible to use external oscillators and noise sources in conjunction with the onboard modules to get a more varied palette of sounds. Perhaps I'll do that and make a new sample set!

Recorded 2020-05-17

title: 6S Montana Rack VSTi
description: The Montana Rack is a deeply multisampled VST tribute to the 2001 Motif Rack, designed to capture its classic sound in software form. The Motif was THE SYNTH used by Zaytoven, Xangang, PoloBoyShawty, & Stoopidxool to invent genres like Plugg & Glo!
